$comment: Coverage thresholds for orchestrator agents and CI. Portable across projects — adjust values per-repo. Scoped to files modified by TER-1070 (see vitest.config.ts coverage.include).

enforcement.description: Orchestrator agents MUST check coverage against these thresholds before marking any task complete or creating a PR. Coverage is scoped to files modified by this work (see vitest.config.ts coverage.include). If coverage drops below any threshold, the task fails.
